### Two ways to fix

| Method | How |
|--------|-----|
| **Quick Fix** | Hover over faded code, click the lightbulb icon, select "Remove unused export" or "Delete this file" |
| **Auto-Fix** | Removes the `export` keyword from unused exports (keeps the function/type) and removes unused dependencies from package.json |
| **Preview** | Run **Preview Fixes** first to see what would change without modifying files |
